posts.author: sgharibian (Sarkis Gharibian)
posts.cookedHtml:
I recently learned how to duplicate a workspace by creating a workspace template app under the developer settings. The issue I’m having is that after I duplicate a workspace I run into some key issues

  1. It doesn’t create the folders I have setup in my template. I have to manually recreate the folder and move the boards around with each workspace I create using the template

  2. I have some boards in my template that are shareable and those get created as regular dashboards. I have to manually go into the workspace and change type to shareableZ

  3. I have preset members in the template that I want to duplicate into workspaces however those are not carrying through. I have to manually go in and add the members.

Does anyone know if there’s a way to fix this from happening?
